_about: Adventurer Directory — the expanded rank ledger and the pool the generator draws rank_gate / rank_up / roster_change actors from. Mirrors the Townee Directory: each adventurer carries rank, dues (current|owing), chapter (their home guild-chapter, resolves to cipher_table), and a logbook (a single Completion-Archive summary of their sealed completions, mirrored into references.json archive by the Banks phase). A new Reference tab. Keyed by id so a check's `entry` resolves like rank_ledger. affiliation for every generated adventurer visit is `adventure` (matching the existing visitors.json enum spelling). BANKS (Phase 2, 2026-07-13): ids + cross-refs preserved from skeleton; names + blurbs enriched. See ../CONTENT-BANKS.md §Adventurer Directory + §Dues.
_tab: Adventurer Directory — the roster pool: rank, dues, chapter, logbook

adv-brek-hollow.name: Brek Hollowmere
adv-brek-hollow.blurb: Blunt and reliable; clears low-floor barrows without fuss. Three clean seals since he made bronze.

adv-yria-saltcrag.name: Yria Saltcrag
adv-yria-saltcrag.blurb: Coast-born tracker who reads tide-caves the way others read maps. Never late on dues, never short a seal.

adv-torvald-ember.name: Torvald Emberwatch
adv-torvald-ember.blurb: Fire-warded veteran; the chapter's first pick for drake work. Eight sealed completions carried him to gold.

adv-nima-green.name: Nima Greenhollow
adv-nima-green.blurb: Earth-warded and capable, but twelve gold behind on dues — membership lapsed, so any gate or rank-up she files fails on dues until she settles.

adv-castor-thorn.name: Castor Thornwatch
adv-castor-thorn.blurb: Meticulous mapper — which makes the logbook worse: three entries, only two distinct seals. One completion was stamped twice. A rank-up submission that should be caught on the duplicate axis.

adv-lysa-ironquill.name: Lysa Ironquill
adv-lysa-ironquill.blurb: Fresh copper initiate with a single honest seal to her name — genuine, but one short of the bronze threshold. A clean under-threshold rank-up fail.

adv-brand-hollow.name: Brand Hollowmere
adv-brand-hollow.blurb: Brek's chapter-kin and a harder hire; eight distinct seals, all in order. Takes gold-gated roosts without escort.

adv-perrin-saltcrag.name: Perrin Saltcrag
adv-perrin-saltcrag.blurb: Solid silver record, but nine gold in arrears — a card on file with membership gone stale. Gate and transfer filings fail on the secondary dues stamp.

adv-oona-ember.name: Oona Emberwatch
adv-oona-ember.blurb: Cleric with a water ward: enrolling her via roster_change flips ward-required shrines (e.g. saltmarsh-haunt) fieldable — the roster-capability lever that preserves the enrol-then-field seam.

adv-huld-green.name: Huld Greenhollow
adv-huld-green.blurb: Quiet forest ranger, dues paid, three clean seals. Dependable filler for bronze-gated surveys.

adv-sable-thorn.name: Sable Thornwatch
adv-sable-thorn.blurb: Two ways to fail at once: twenty gold in dues AND a logbook of eight entries with only seven distinct seals. A repeat offender who leans on a duplicated completion — catch the dues or the duplicate axis.

adv-miro-ironquill.name: Miro Ironquill
adv-miro-ironquill.blurb: The chapter's lone platinum: thirteen distinct seals, earth-warded, above every gate. Turning one away should never be on rank.

adv-tessa-hollow.name: Tessa Hollowmere
adv-tessa-hollow.blurb: Eager copper with two genuine seals — honest work, but still under the bronze threshold. The second under-threshold rank-up fail.

adv-garret-saltcrag.name: Garret Saltcrag
adv-garret-saltcrag.blurb: Yria's chapter-junior; three clean seals, dues current. A safe bronze-gate approval to balance the fails.

adv-vesk-ember.name: Vesk Emberwatch
adv-vesk-ember.blurb: Fire-warded scout out of Emberwatch; five distinct seals, all in order. Fields drake-country surveys silver and up.

adv-wynn-green.name: Wynn Greenhollow
adv-wynn-green.blurb: Gold-rank cleric: enrolling him via roster_change flips cleric-ward postings (e.g. crypt-of-bells-cleanse) fieldable — the second roster-capability lever alongside Oona.

_chapter_note: Every `chapter` must resolve to a cipher_table entry in references.json. hollowmere + ironquill exist; greenhollow, saltcrag, emberwatch, thornwatch are references.json ADDITIONS (Banks phase). 6 chapters total.
_logbook_note: Each `logbook.archive_id` is mirrored into references.json archive as { entries, distinct_seals, all_owner: <adv-id> } by the Banks phase, matching the existing two-rivers-logbook / culpepper-logbook shape. adv-castor-thorn (3 entries / 2 distinct) and adv-sable-thorn (8/7) are the pre-seeded DUPLICATE-seal fails; adv-lysa-ironquill (1) and adv-tessa-hollow (2) are pre-seeded UNDER-threshold fails.
_dues_note: 3 of 16 are `owing` (adv-nima-green, adv-perrin-saltcrag, adv-sable-thorn) so rank_gate / rank_up can fail on the `dues` axis. adv-oona-ember (cleric+water) and adv-wynn-green (cleric) are the roster-capability levers for roster_change → fieldability interlocks.
